name: Chicken Dijon
recipeIngredient: 6 Whole chicken breasts, Skinned, boned & halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Lightly grease 1 or 2 large baking sheets.
2. Sprinkle chicken lightly with salt and pepper.
3. Stir together yogurt and mustard in a small bowl.
4. Spread mixture on bottom sides of chicken.
5. Place chicken on baking sheets, coated side down, leaving space between pieces.
6. Spread mixture over top.
7. Combine bread crumbs, thyme, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper.
8. Sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture over chicken.
9. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes until golden-brown and no longer pink in the center.
